message:
fix: DataFrame.drop() never removed columns from result

drop() created __drop__ computed columns but no code path ever
stripped them or the original columns from the result. Rows still
contained the dropped columns plus spurious __drop__X: undefined keys.

Added applyDrops() in collect() to delete both the original and marker
keys from rows and filter them from result.columns. Added regression
tests for single and multi-column drop.
